'''''Badlands''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Commanded by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Kraven]], ''Badlands'' served under [[Garreth Holtz]]'s [[Corrupter Task Force]].

==History==
The ''Badlands'' accompanied the [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] during her pursuit of the [[Defiance Task Force]] after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. It was present during a successful Rebel raid on the fleet.

{{Ship-stub}}
